name: build-androidos-apps
description: Build Android apps with workflows for Kotlin and Compose setup, Material 3 UI, refactors, App Actions, emulator browser previews, debugging, performance profiling, and leak investigation.

interface.shortDescription: Build, preview, refine, profile, and debug Android apps with Kotlin, Compose, Material 3, and Gradle
interface.longDescription: Use Build AndroidOS Apps to set up current Kotlin and Jetpack Compose projects, build Material 3 adaptive UI, refactor Compose screens, expose shortcuts and App Actions, mirror Android emulators in the visible Codex side-panel browser, audit runtime performance, capture Macrobenchmark and Perfetto evidence, investigate memory leaks, and debug apps on Android emulators or connected devices with Gradle and adb workflows.
defaultPrompt: Build, preview, or debug an Android app with Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Material 3, and an emulator.
